title: Tonkotsu Ramen
instructions: Chashu: braise pork belly in soy sauce.
Assemble bowls with broth, noodles, toppings.
Add soft-boiled egg, nori, green onions.

reviews.text: Incredible! I added a splash of sesame oil at the end and topped with corn and butter. Also added a dash of chili oil for heat.
Used chicken broth instead of pork for a lighter version. Added extra green onions and a squeeze of lime.
Perfect recipe! Followed it exactly and turned out great. Will make again.
Really good recipe. My family loved it. Simple to follow.
It was okay. Nothing special but edible. Might make again with changes.
Didn't work for me. Flavor was off and texture was wrong.
